description.gm:
Each Arudora memento is unique in appearance, but all seven are approximately the same size. Carried by each of the cursed family members, these mementos have within them the power to unlock entire portions of Bastardhall from the ghostly cursed state the castle traditionally exists in.

Activate—Return Memento 3 (manipulate) You place the memento into the appropriate statue's clutches in the fountain located in area B3 of Bastardhall. The statue briefly animates to claim the memento, which turns to stone and becomes thereafter a permanent part of the statue, effectively destroying the memento while granting a boon to the party that persists for the remainder of this Adventure Path. When this cracked hourglass is Returned, the vaults (detailed in Chapter 8) are unlocked. Death's grasp on the PCs wanes—for the rest of this Adventure Path, the DCs for all recovery checks made by a dying PC are reduced by 2.

Destruction An Arudora memento is destroyed when it's activated with Return Memento, and the boon it grants upon this returning lasts until the very end of the Adventure Path.

publication.title: Pathfinder Adventure Path: Bastion of Blasphemies
